headline: 3 Reasons Investors Love Synchrony Financial (SYF)
summary: Over the past six months, Synchrony Financial’s stock price fell to $66.59. Shareholders have lost 12.5% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 4.8%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Home Depot Sees Higher Big Ticket Sales: Is Pro Demand Driving Growth?
summary: HD reports rising purchases of above $1,000 in Q4, as Pro customers drive stronger big-ticket demand, lifting average ticket, even as overall transactions fall.

headline: Home Depot Slides 8% in a Month: A Buy Opportunity or Warning Sign?
summary: HD faces pressure from weak housing turnover and cautious consumers, but investments in Pro customers and the SRS business aim to drive long-term growth.

headline: Argus and Mizuho Lift Lowe’s (LOW) Targets, See Growth and Market Share Gains
summary: Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW) is included among the Dividend Kings List: Top 15 Stocks. On March 2, Argus raised its price recommendation on Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW) to $288 from $286. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares after the company reported a Q4 earnings beat. The analyst said the company appears well-positioned to […]
